since_last: 39% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.26% · BTC +0.11% · Gold -0.04% · Nasdaq100 -1.30%. 39% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.11%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.11%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.95%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NET is the standout at +10.28%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +10.28%, DDOG +4.99%, PLTR +4.56%, NOW +4.47%, WDAY +4.07%. Laggards: TER -9.49%, INTC -9.26%, AMBA -8.87%, MRVL -7.46%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.15% at $152.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
